subcodes.first_line: O Ramadan! God willing, by the grace of the All-Merciful, thou shalt drink from the cup of everlasting life and hold fast unto the Beloved of all existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رمضان انشاء الله بعنایت رحمن از کاس حیوان بیاشامی و بمحبوب امکان متمسک
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Satan; the Evil One
